# DRAFT Framework

DRAFT is the Deployable Reference Architecture Framework Toolkit. This
repository is the public framework for creating machine-readable, deployable
architecture catalogs in downstream private workspaces.

## AI Bootstrap

- Canonical AI instructions: AGENTS.md
- Draftsman role: framework/docs/draftsman.md
- Draftsman AI guidance: framework/docs/draftsman-ai-configuration.md
- Framework index: AI_INDEX.md
- Schema reference: framework/docs/yaml-schema-reference.md
- Object Definition Checklists: framework/docs/odcs.md
- Validation command: python3 framework/tools/validate.py

## Core Concepts

- ABB: Architecture Building Block, a third-party product or appliance object.
- RBB: Reference Building Block, the reusable runtime or service building block.
- RA: Reference Architecture, a reusable deployment pattern.
- SDM: Software Distribution Manifest, a product-specific deployed reality.
- ODC: Object Definition Checklist, the interview and completeness model.
- Compliance Profile: an explicit framework claim on an artifact; control
  implementations are evidence for declared profiles only.
- DRD/ARD: Deployment Risk or Decision, stored as object type `ard`.
- Drafting Session: resumable state for incomplete authoring work.
- Effective Model: framework base configurations plus private workspace
  configurations plus private workspace catalog content.

## Important Paths

- README.md
- AGENTS.md
- AI_INDEX.md
- framework/docs/
- framework/schemas/
- framework/configurations/
- examples/catalog/
- templates/
- docs/index.html
- framework/tools/validate.py
- framework/tools/generate_browser.py
- framework/tools/generate_ai_index.py
